raw_response: {"detections":[{"biasType":"Opinion Statements Presented as Fact","biasedText":"BreakingBusinessNetflix Will Acquire Warner Bros. In $83 Billion Deal—Discovery Will Be Split Off","explanation":"States the acquisition and spinoff as certain outcomes, even though the article later notes the deal is subject to regulatory approvals and may not close."},{"biasType":"Unsubstantiated claims","biasedText":"Warner Bros. Discovery has reportedly entered exclusive talks with Netflix for a sale of its studio and TV businesses.","explanation":"Uses “reportedly” without attributing the claim to a specific source in this sentence, leaving the assertion unsupported in the author’s voice."},{"biasType":"Spin","biasedText":"in move that follows a weeks-long bidding war in which the streaming giant beat out Paramount and Comcast.","explanation":"Dramatizes the transaction with combative language (“bidding war,” “beat out,” “streaming giant”), which adds sensational tone beyond neutral description of competitive bids."}]}

detections.biasedText: BreakingBusinessNetflix Will Acquire Warner Bros. In $83 Billion Deal—Discovery Will Be Split Off
detections.explanation: States the acquisition and spinoff as certain outcomes, even though the article later notes the deal is subject to regulatory approvals and may not close.

detections.biasedText: Warner Bros. Discovery has reportedly entered exclusive talks with Netflix for a sale of its studio and TV businesses.
detections.explanation: Uses “reportedly” without attributing the claim to a specific source in this sentence, leaving the assertion unsupported in the author’s voice.

detections.biasedText: in move that follows a weeks-long bidding war in which the streaming giant beat out Paramount and Comcast.
detections.explanation: Dramatizes the transaction with combative language (“bidding war,” “beat out,” “streaming giant”), which adds sensational tone beyond neutral description of competitive bids.
